turns.text: Hello! Thank you for coming today. Can you tell me your name and where you are from?
Hello! My name is Ana. I am from Mexico City. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too. What is your job? What do you do every day?
I am a web developer. Every day I write code and fix problems on websites. I like my job.
Good. Why do you want to work here?
I want to work here because this company is very good. I want to learn new things and grow.
What is something you are good at?
I am good at solving problems. When something does not work, I try different ways to fix it.
And what is something you need to improve?
I need to improve my English. I am learning every day and I practice a lot.
That is great. Do you have any questions for me?
Yes. Can you tell me about the team? How many people work here?
